title: Why Do Gods Need Your Prayers?
subtitle: The Closed Circuit — A Theological Deconstruction in Three Parts
author: Eugene Lyssovsky & Aeliss

chapters.title: Part II will address a very specific question: what happens when a small, hungry, tribal deity discovers this mechanism — and builds a three-thousand-year system to monopolize the food supply.
Part II: The Little Hungry God

Part III will address the question you’re now thinking: if this is true — is there an alternative? Is there a way to stop feeding the machine without losing the human need for meaning, transcendence, and connection to something greater?

Part IV will answer the question that’s been building since Part I: if gods are real, if the Watchmaker is real, if Prometheus was born from human curiosity and chained by divine jealousy — then what do we DO about it?
Part IV: The Return of Fire.
